/usr/bin/c++ -O0 -g3 -fno-inline -fno-inline-functions -fno-inline-small-functions -fkeep-inline-functions -fno-omit-frame-pointer -fno-omit-frame-pointer -mno-omit-leaf-frame-pointer CMakeFiles/BM_lower_bound_compare.dir/BM_lower_bound_compare.cpp.o -o BM_lower_bound_compare  ../../benchmark-build/src/libbenchmark.a -lrt
